articles.title: YieldMax DIS option income strategy ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.0419
articles.summary: The YieldMax DIS Option Income Strategy ETF has announced a weekly distribution of $0.0419 per share. This distribution is part of the ETF's strategy to provide income through options. Further details about the distribution, including ex-dividend and payment dates, were not immediately available in this brief announcement.
